info.title: Crystals and Healing Stones API
info.description:
Production-ready crystal healing API + MCP for AI agents and developers. Look up 80 healing crystals and gemstones with spiritual, emotional, and physical healing properties. Filter by chakra (Root through Crown), zodiac sign, or element. Search by keyword, browse birthstones by month, discover crystal pairings, and get random or daily crystal picks. Includes Mohs hardness ratings, numerological vibrations, planetary associations, and crystal pairing recommendations. Built for wellness apps, crystal shop platforms, chakra balancing tools, astrology integrations, and AI-powered spiritual advisors.

# RoxyAPI: AI-Native Insight Infrastructure

> **Base URL:** `https://roxyapi.com/api/v2`
> All endpoint paths below are relative to this base URL.

The only multi-domain spiritual intelligence API. 9 domains (astrology, tarot, numerology, crystals, dreams, I-Ching, angel numbers, Vedic astrology, location), 122+ endpoints, one API key, instant activation. Native MCP support for AI agents.

## Who uses RoxyAPI

- **Developers** building astrology apps, tarot platforms, numerology calculators, or dream journals
- **AI agent builders** connecting Claude, GPT, or Gemini to real calculation engines via MCP
- **Vibe coders** shipping insight apps with Cursor, Bolt, or Replit using zero domain knowledge
- **Founders and brands** launching branded spiritual experiences for their audience

## Quick start (60 seconds)

**1. Get your API key** at [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing). Instant delivery, no account required.

**2. Make your first call:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/tarot/draw -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"count": 3}'
```

**3. Monitor usage:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/usage
```

## AI agent integration (MCP)

RoxyAPI has native Model Context Protocol support. Your AI agent auto-discovers all 122+ endpoints as callable tools with zero configuration:
- **Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf**: Add MCP server URL in settings
- **OpenAI Agents, Gemini ADK**: Connect via Streamable HTTP transport
- **Custom agents**: Use the MCP Python/TypeScript SDK

MCP endpoints: `https://roxyapi.com/mcp/{domain}` (e.g., `/mcp/astrology-api`, `/mcp/tarot-api`)

Setup guide: [roxyapi.com/docs/mcp](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp)

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via header or query param:
- **Header (recommended):** `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY`
- **Query param (testing):** `?api_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Response format

Clean JSON, no wrapper objects. Errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`. The `error` field is human-readable (may change wording). The `code` field is machine-readable (stable — safe to switch on programmatically).

Rate limit headers on every response: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Used`

## Errors

All errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`:

| Status | Code | When |
|--------|------|------|
| 400 | `validation_error` | Missing or invalid parameters |
| 401 | `api_key_required` | No API key provided |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | Key format invalid or tampered |
| 401 | `subscription_not_found` | Key references non-existent subscription |
| 401 | `subscription_inactive` | Subscription cancelled, expired, or suspended |
| 404 | `not_found` | Resource not found |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Monthly quota reached |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error |

## Pricing

Flat per-request pricing. Every call counts the same, whether a planet position or a full birth chart with aspects. No credit systems, no variable costs. Plans from $39 to $699/month.

See [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing)

## Resources

- [Quickstart guide](https://roxyapi.com/docs/quickstart) - first API call in 60 seconds
- [Documentation](https://roxyapi.com/docs) - guides, tutorials, domain reference
- [MCP setup](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp) - connect AI agents
- [Starter apps](https://roxyapi.com/starters) - clone and deploy in 30 minutes
- [FAQ](https://roxyapi.com/faq) - common questions
- [Contact](https://roxyapi.com/contact) - support and API key recovery

Filter by chakra (Root through Crown), zodiac sign, or element. Search by keyword, browse birthstones by month, discover crystal pairings, and get random or daily crystal picks. apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your API key for accessing RoxyAPI. Alternatively, you can pass the API key as a query parameter "api_key".

get.description: Get healing crystals and gemstones associated with a specific zodiac sign. Returns summary data for each crystal. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for full healing properties. Supports all 12 zodiac signs from Aries through Pisces. Perfect for personalized crystal recommendations based on astrological birth chart data.

schema.description: Zodiac sign name, case-insensitive (e.g., pisces, Pisces, PISCES all work). Valid: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces.

parameters.description: Zodiac sign name, case-insensitive (e.g., pisces, Pisces, PISCES all work). Valid: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces.
parameters.name: sign

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.name: lang

parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination. Default 0.
parameters.name: offset

sign.description: The zodiac sign that was queried.

total.description: Total number of crystals associated with this zodiac sign.

id.description: URL-safe crystal identifier for detail lookup.

imageUrl.description: URL to crystal photograph for visual identification.

colors.description: Primary colors of this crystal variety. Null when color data is unavailable.

crystals.description: Crystal summaries for this zodiac sign. Call /crystals/:id for full healing properties.

post.description: Get the crystal of the day as a discovery teaser. Returns a deterministic crystal based on the current date (or a provided seed date), ensuring all users see the same crystal for any given day. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for complete spiritual, emotional, and physical healing properties. Perfect for daily guidance features, push notifications, wellness app widgets, and crystal journal integrations.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.name: lang

seed.description: Optional seed for reproducible readings. Same seed + same date = same crystal every time. Pass any unique identifier (userId, email hash, session token). Omit for anonymous daily readings.

date.description: Date for the reading in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC). Useful for viewing past daily readings or pre-generating future ones.

200.description: Daily crystal teaser with summary information

date.description: The date used for crystal selection (UTC).

seed.description: Computed seed used for this reading. Same seed always produces the same crystal.

name.description: Display name of the crystal selected for this date.

id.description: URL-safe identifier. Call /crystals/:id for full healing properties.

imageUrl.description: URL to crystal photograph. Use for daily crystal card display and visual features.

description.description: Overview of the crystal covering primary healing purpose and benefits.

chakras.description: Chakra energy centers this crystal resonates with for energy healing practice.

zodiacSigns.description: Zodiac signs this crystal is traditionally associated with. Null when zodiac data is unavailable.

affirmation.description: Positive affirmation aligned with the selected crystal. Use for daily affirmation features and meditation guidance.

get.description: Get a randomly selected healing crystal as a discovery teaser. Returns a different crystal on each request (non-deterministic). Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for complete spiritual, emotional, and physical healing properties. Perfect for crystal discovery features, surprise crystal picks, crystal roulette games, and exploration widgets. For a deterministic daily crystal that is the same for all users on a given date, use the /daily endpoint instead.

get.description: Get complete healing properties and metaphysical data for a specific crystal or gemstone. Returns spiritual, emotional, and physical healing interpretations along with chakra associations, zodiac connections, elemental properties, and crystal pairing recommendations. Authoritative interpretations covering all major healing crystals.

schema.description: URL-safe crystal identifier (e.g., "amethyst", "rose-quartz", "black-tourmaline"). Must match an entry in the database.

parameters.description: URL-safe crystal identifier (e.g., "amethyst", "rose-quartz", "black-tourmaline"). Must match an entry in the database.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

200.description: Complete crystal healing properties with all associations

name.description: Display name of the crystal or healing stone.

imageUrl.description: URL to a high-quality crystal photograph. Use for visual crystal guides, product listings, and crystal identification features.

description.description: Overview of the crystal covering its primary healing purpose, spiritual significance, and key benefits.

spiritual.description: Spiritual and metaphysical healing properties including energy work, meditation benefits, and higher consciousness connections. Null when spiritual interpretation is unavailable.

emotional.description: Emotional healing properties including stress relief, relationship support, and emotional balance benefits.

physical.description: Physical healing associations traditionally attributed to this crystal in crystal healing practice. Null when physical healing data is unavailable.

meaning.description: Detailed healing interpretations across three areas: spiritual and metaphysical, emotional and psychological, and physical body associations.

chakras.description: Chakra energy centers this crystal resonates with. One of: Root, Sacral, Solar Plexus, Heart, Throat, Third Eye, Crown.

zodiacSigns.description: Zodiac signs this crystal is traditionally associated with. Null when zodiac data is unavailable. Useful for personalized crystal recommendations based on birth chart.

planet.description: Ruling planet or celestial body associated with this crystal in astrological tradition. Null when planetary association is unavailable.

elements.description: Elemental associations (Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Storm) connecting the crystal to natural forces and energy types. Null when elemental data is unavailable.

colors.description: Primary colors of this crystal variety. Null when color data is unavailable. Useful for color-based crystal selection and filtering.

hardness.description: Mohs hardness scale rating (1-10). Indicates durability for jewelry use. Quartz family is 7, Diamond is 10, Selenite is 2.

numericalVibration.description: Numerological vibration number linking this crystal to numerology meanings. Connects crystal healing with numerology practice.

keywords.description: Five to nine keywords capturing the core healing properties and spiritual themes of this crystal. Null when keyword data is unavailable.

birthMonth.description: Birth month (1-12) if this crystal is a traditional birthstone. Null if not a birthstone. January is 1, December is 12.

affirmation.description: Positive affirmation aligned with this crystal energy. Use for meditation, journaling, or daily affirmation features.

pairsWith.description: Crystal identifiers that pair well with this stone for enhanced healing combinations. Use for crystal grid and pairing recommendations.
